title: Unique Features Functionality - Functional Test Plan
overview: Functional testing of the optional Unique Features field where Assistive Partners can highlight up to 3 unique accessibility features of their products with titles and descriptions (max 100 characters each). Covers field access, input validation, optional behavior, GenAI assistance, and error handling.

testCases.title: Verify Unique Feature Field Presence and Instructions
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded. Description section is visible.
expectedResults: Optional field labeled 'Highlight Unique Feature(s)' is visible
Instructional note displays: 'Use this section to highlight special or accessibility-focused features of your product (optional).'
Field is clearly marked as optional
testCases.postconditions: Unique Features field is visible on Product Upload Form

testCases.title: Add Single Unique Feature with Title and Description
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded.
steps: Enter description: 'Easy portability for travel and storage'

testData.featureDescription: Easy portability for travel and storage

expectedResults: Title and description fields appear
Both fields accept text input
Feature is saved successfully
Character count displays for description field
testCases.postconditions: Single unique feature is saved on the product

testCases.title: Add Maximum 3 Unique Features
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded.
steps: Add first feature with title and description
Add second feature with title and description
Add third feature with title and description

feature1.title: Foldable Design
feature1.description: Easy portability for travel and storage

feature2.title: Voice Prompts
feature2.description: Includes tactile buttons and voice prompts

expectedResults: All 3 features are added successfully
Add button is disabled after 3 features
Error message displays: 'You can highlight up to 3 features, with a maximum of 100 characters each.'
All 3 features are saved
testCases.postconditions: 3 unique features are saved, Add button is disabled

testCases.title: Validate 100 Character Limit Per Description
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded.

testData.description100chars: Designed for ease of use with limited hand mobility and includes tactile buttons for accessibility.
testData.description101chars: Designed for ease of use with limited hand mobility and includes tactile buttons for accessibility.X

expectedResults: Character counter displays remaining characters
100 characters are accepted
101st character is blocked or error shown
Inline validation message appears if limit exceeded
testCases.postconditions: Form shows validation state for character limit

testCases.title: Submit Product Without Unique Features
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded. All mandatory fields are filled.
expectedResults: Product submits successfully
No validation error for empty unique features
Product status changes to Pending Review
Product is valid and publishable
testCases.postconditions: Product submitted without unique features in Pending Review status

testCases.title: Use GenAI to Refine Feature Description
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded. GenAI service is available.
steps: Add unique feature with basic description
expectedResults: 'Assist with GenAI' button is visible beside field
AI generates accessibility-compliant phrasing
Suggestion is clear and inclusive
AP can view generated content before accepting
testCases.postconditions: GenAI suggestion is displayed for review

testCases.title: Verify Keyboard Accessibility for Unique Features Fields
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded.
steps: Use Tab key to navigate unique features fields
Use keyboard to add, edit, and remove features
expectedResults: All input fields are keyboard accessible
Tab order is logical
Add/remove buttons work with Enter key
Focus indicators are visible
testCases.postconditions: Keyboard accessibility verified for all unique feature controls

testCases.title: Validate Character Limit Error Message
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded.

testData.oversizedDescription: Designed for ease of use with limited hand mobility and includes tactile buttons for accessibility and more text here.

expectedResults: Inline validation error displays
Error message: 'You can highlight up to 3 features, with a maximum of 100 characters each.'
Form does not submit
Field is highlighted with error state
testCases.postconditions: Form remains in error state with character limit validation message

testCases.title: Validate Empty Title with Description
testCases.preconditions: Approved AP is logged in. Product Upload Form is loaded.
steps: Leave title empty but add description

testData.featureDescription: Easy portability for travel and storage

expectedResults: Validation error for missing title
Error message indicates title is required if description is provided
Form does not submit
testCases.postconditions: Form remains in error state with title required validation
